reviews.review_description: Do you do anything in this game. You enter at night…wander around, can’t access anything.. not sure how someone was able to get on the Ferris wheel? I could pick up the bow, but not the arrow.. and then it froze. No bueno.

reviews.review_title: Not a fun sim- More like a horror title
reviews.review_description: When I "rode" the Ferris wheel "ride" which consists of 4 carriges with a blocked view only overlooking the ugly blocky theme park. There were no people at the theme park but for some reason TWO stray dogs that bark inseccantly when you get on the ride. There is also some weird voice-over saying things like "the next stop is station yellow." And it never stopped. I COULDN'T GET OFF! I honestly felt like I was in a horror title. Not sure how this got onto app lab or how it got any more than 2 stars by anyone. Maybe I'm missing something. Worth an install just to see how horrifying the theme park is and ponder the great questions of the universe like "where is station yellow????"

developer_response.body:
Mr. R0binG00dfell0, We hope you and your loved ones are doing good and are healthy in these difficult times. We thank you for your input. We love feedback because it not only allows us to connect with our audience but also helps us improve. We have taken your inputs into consideration and will work on the same in our subsequent versions. Stay Safe.
 Regards

reviews.review_description: Visitors can enjoy rides, as well as an entire theme park, equipped with a food area, the park to play the game.

reviews.review_description: Not the worst VR amusement park (some of the other are just insanely amateurish).

developer_response.body: byteframe:| Thank you for your review. This was our pilot effort. We are working on the future.

reviews.review_title: It's the only VR theme park around!
reviews.review_description: Look, it's not without imperfections, but it's free and it gives you a virtual reality theme park, there is literally no other Quest 2 game like it! You can see a full exploration and review here: https://youtu.be/Ge75lcVRapU

developer_response.body: BallsyVR:| Thank you for your review. This was our pilot effort. We are working on the future.
